untranslatable_reason: Signal requires order book microstructure data (bid/offer levels, time precedence, quoted prices, spread width, price improvement mechanics) which are not available in the allowed indicators list. This is a market microstructure rule requiring L2/L3 data and order management logic, not OHLCV technical analysis.
translation_notes: MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_6_0 is a price improvement rule for navigating order book priority. It requires: (1) identification of existing orders at specific price levels with time precedence, (2) dynamic spread measurement, (3) tick-based price improvement execution, and (4) order fill monitoring. None of these elements can be expressed using standard OHLCV indicators. The signal belongs to execution/microstructure domain, not price pattern analysis.
